items.name: VOID ZERO
items.description: VOID ZERO is our baseline for performance. A clean 200mg caffeine strike balanced with L-Theanine, built to maintain focus without the jitter or crash. No sugar, no noise — just steady uptime for coding, creating, and long-form thinking.

products.name: VOID ZERO
products.description: VOID ZERO is our baseline for performance. A clean 200mg caffeine strike balanced with L-Theanine, built to maintain focus without the jitter or crash. No sugar, no noise — just steady uptime for coding, creating, and long-form thinking.

products.name: FLOW IO
products.description: Mental Focus redefined. FLOW IO utilizes Yuzu extracts and advanced nootropics to sharpen cognitive precision. Designed for deep-state flow where the world disappears and the work becomes effortless.

products.name: FLOW ZEN
products.description: Calm Clarity. ZEN is a non-stimulant formula designed to lower cortisol and quiet the mental noise, allowing for meditative productivity and absolute presence in high-pressure environments.

products.name: FLOW AXIS
products.description: Cognitive Balance. AXIS acts as the stabilizer for your mental equilibrium, preventing burn-out and ensuring your brain operates at its natural frequency throughout the day.

products.name: FORM ION
products.description: Physical Performance distilled. FORM IO bridges the gap between mind and muscle, providing the raw materials required for explosive movement and high-cadence endurance.

products.name: FORM CORE
products.description: Pure Power. CORE is a high-density formula built for the daily athlete. It provides the physiological foundation to sustain high-intensity training and physical stress.

products.name: FORM PEAK
products.description: Maximum Output. PEAK is a heavy-duty performance catalyst for those pushing the absolute limits of human physiology. It is the final gear in your physical engine.

products.name: FORM BASE
products.description: Daily Support system. BASE provides the essential micronutrients and minerals required to keep the human machine running smoothly in a modern, high-stress environment.

products.name: NOX
products.description: Evening/Social catalyst. RITENOX is a sophisticated formula designed to ease social anxiety and heighten engagement without the neurotoxicity of traditional alternatives.

products.name: DUSK
products.description: Wind Down protocol. DUSK signals to your nervous system that the day is done. It prepares the mind for deep, restorative REM sleep to ensure maximum recovery.

products.name: ECHO
products.description: Social Connection. ECHO enhances empathy and verbal fluidity, making it the perfect companion for networking, high-stakes communication, or deep social immersion.
